rulings.Case Title: PAUL WESTBROOK et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 5, 2009, LINE 5, DEFENDANT SB DECKING, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTS BURDEN. PLAINTIFF CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE AND CAUSATION. OBJECTION TO HIXSON DECLARATION OVERRULED. DEFENDANT ADMITS IN INTERROGATORY RESPONSES THAT IT MANUFACTURED AN ASBESTOS CONTAINING PRODUCT. HIXSON DECLARATION SUPPORTS EXPOSURE. COURT ADOPTS PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED ORDER. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARION ROBITAILLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 5, 2009, LINE 7, DEFENDANT DURAMETALLIC CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTS BURDEN. PLAINTIFF RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE AND CAUSATION. OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION OVERRULED. OBJECTION TO AY DECLARATION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT ADMITS IT SUPPLIED PRODUCTS CONTAINING ASBESTOS BETWEEN 1930 AND 1985. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO INTENTIONAL TORT. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROPOUND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SPECIFIC TO THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED FARMERS AGENTS ASSOCIATION INC ON BEHALF VS. FARMERS GROUP INC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 5, 2009, LINE 8, DEFENDANTS FARMERS GROUP INC, FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE, FARMERS NEW WORLD LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY, TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE, FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE, MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TIME-BARRED. THE INSTANT ACTION STEMS FROM THE SAME ALLEGED BREACH OF CONTRACTS BETWEEN PLAINTIFF'S MEMBERS AND DEFENDANT THAT WAS ALLEGED IN THE PRIOR TEXAS ACTION FILED IN 1992. PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO BRING SUIT ON BEHALF OF ITS MEMBERS STEMS FROM THE RIGHTS OF ITS MEMBERS WHO ENTERED INTO THE CONTRACTS WITH DEFENDANT. THOSE CLAIMS LIE IN BREACH OF CONTRACT, PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO SUE ALSO LIES IN BREACH OF CONTRACT, AND THE 4 YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS APPLIES. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT MAY BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. =(302/CWW/PL)

REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES DENIED AS UNREASONABLE. IN VIEW OF OPPOSING COUNSEL'S NON-OPPOSITION, MATTER COULD HAVE BEEN PRESENTED BY WAY OF STIPULATION EX PARTE.
